summary: E2E tested Content Blueprint Library feature. All 33 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified with 3 product cards (25 hooks, 6 frameworks, 8 story ideas). Purchase flow confirmed - credits deducted correctly and content unlocks.
features_tested: Blueprint Library catalog endpoint - returns 3 products with correct item counts (25, 6, 8)
Hooks endpoint - returns 25 hooks sorted by engagement score (96%, 95%, 94%...)
Hooks endpoint - filters by niche (Motivation, Business, Fitness, Tech, etc.)
Frameworks endpoint - returns 6 frameworks with categories (Educational, Story, Controversial, How-To, List)
Story Ideas endpoint - returns 8 ideas with genres (Adventure, Friendship, Educational, Fantasy, Nature, Kindness)
Story Ideas endpoint - includes age groups (3-5, 4-6, 5-7, 6-8 yrs)
Purchase endpoint - validates product_type, item_id, category requirements
Purchase endpoint - deducts credits (single hook = 1 credit)
Purchase endpoint - grants access after purchase
Content locking - locked content shows truncated text with '...'
Content unlocking - purchased content shows full text, variations, Copy button
Admin seed database endpoint - protected, works for admin users
Audit log service - admin endpoints secured
critical_code_review_comments: Zero API cost feature - all content served from MongoDB database
Proper credit protection - deducts BEFORE granting access
Content properly locked/unlocked based on purchase status
data-testid attributes present on all key UI elements
User credits displayed in header with real-time updates after purchase
seed_data_creation: Database pre-seeded with 25 hooks, 6 frameworks, 8 story ideas
context_for_next_testing_agent: Content Blueprint Library fully functional at /app/blueprint-library. 3 products: Viral Hook Bank (25 items, 1cr/hook), Reel Framework Packs (6 items, 5cr/framework), Kids Story Ideas (8 items, 3cr/idea). Full access pricing: 75, 100, 80 credits respectively. Dashboard has Blueprint Library link with NEW badge.

playwright_tests.story_ideas_view: PASS - 8 items with genres and age groups
